home.heroDesc: A conversational curation platform that connects you with the perfect AI tools for your objectives in a single prompt.
home.whyDesc: Core features that set us apart from other AI tool directories

recommend.title: AI-Powered Recommendations
recommend.desc: AI analyzes your intent to instantly select the best tools from our database.

update.title: Real-time Updates
update.desc: We keep our database fresh with only the best curated AI tools.

korean.title: Full Multilingual Support
korean.desc: All tool names and descriptions are localized to provide the best experience.

compare.title: Easy Pricing Comparison
compare.desc: Quickly filter by pricing models and categories to find exactly what you need.

demand.title: Demand-Based Auto-Addition
demand.desc: If you can't find a tool, our AI automatically registers it the next day.

home.guideDesc: Explore AI tools in 3 simple steps

01.title: Input Requirements
01.desc: Type your needs in natural language. e.g., 'Recommend a free AI for video editing.'

02.title: AI Analysis
02.desc: AI analyzes your intent and filters the best tools based on your criteria.

03.title: Compare & Launch
03.desc: Compare features, pricing, and reviews, then jump straight to the official site.

chat.title: How can I help you?
chat.subtitle: Discover the perfect AI for work, creation, or everyday tasks.
chat.inputPlaceholder: What kind of AI do you need? (e.g. Find me an AI app that checks English resumes)
chat.quotaExceeded: Today's chat quota exceeded. Please log in, recharge, or watch an ad to continue.

birthYear.label: Please tell us your birth year.

library.alreadyUpvoted: You can only upvote this tool once a day.

review.title: {{name}} Reviews
review.empty: No reviews yet. Be the first to leave one!
review.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this review?
review.placeholder: {{name}}, leave a review for this tool.

footer.desc: An interactive curation service that finds the most accurate AI tool for your specific needs.
